# Codegen-owned files (do NOT edit by hand)

Everything in this directory is regenerated by
`Scripts/codegen/generate_ue_components.py`. Hand-edits get clobbered
on the next regen. The `--check` mode of the generator runs as a build
gate (`Scripts/build_and_test.ps1`) so drift between source rules and
on-disk output fails the build.

## Files in this directory

| File                       | Driver                                                          | Owner                                                          |
|----------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------|----------------------------------------------------------------|
| `MjOptionEnums.h`          | `codegen_rules.json[generated_enums.MjOptionEnums]`             | `_phase_generated_enums`                                       |
| `MjStatistic.h`            | `codegen_rules.json[synthetic_categories.MjStatistic]`          | `_phase_synthetic_categories`                                  |
| `MjOptionGenerated.h/.cpp` | `codegen_rules.json[synthetic_categories.MjOption]`             | `_phase_synthetic_categories` (with `emit_apply_methods: true`) |
| `MjVisualGlobal.h`         | `codegen_rules.json[synthetic_categories.MjVisualGlobal]`       | `_phase_synthetic_categories`                                  |
| `MjVisualHeadlight.h`      | `codegen_rules.json[synthetic_categories.MjVisualHeadlight]`    | `_phase_synthetic_categories`                                  |
| `MjArticulationRegistry.h` | `codegen_rules.json[categories]` (walks every category)         | `_phase_articulation_registry`                                 |

Hand-written companion files (NOT codegen-owned, edit freely):

| File                              | Why hand-written                                                                              |
|-----------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `MjOptionGeneratedExtras.cpp`     | URLab pseudo-fields (MemoryMB → mjSpec.memory, enableflags bit-banging for MultiCCD / Sleep). The codegen-emitted `.cpp` calls into `ApplyMjOptionExtras` defined here. |

## Codegen-managed regions in non-Generated files

These hand-written .cpp files have CODEGEN_*_START / CODEGEN_*_END
markers. The codegen owns content between the markers; everything else
is hand-written.

| Marker pair                            | File                                                                    |
|----------------------------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `CODEGEN_IMPORT_*` / `CODEGEN_EXPORT_*`| Most files under `Source/URLab/Private/MuJoCo/Components/`              |
| `CODEGEN_SENSOR_TYPE_SWITCH_*`         | `Source/URLab/Private/MuJoCo/Components/Sensors/MjSensor.cpp`           |
| `CODEGEN_SENSOR_TAG_TO_TYPE_*`         | `Source/URLab/Private/MuJoCo/Components/Sensors/MjSensor.cpp`           |
| `CODEGEN_VIEW_*_FIELDS_*` / `CODEGEN_VIEW_*_BIND_*` | *(planned for Phase 3c follow-up — not yet active in MjBind.h)*            |

## How to refresh after editing rules

```
python Scripts/codegen/generate_ue_components.py
```

To verify drift before committing:

```
python Scripts/codegen/generate_ue_components.py --check
```

To make drift-diagnostics fatal:

```
python Scripts/codegen/generate_ue_components.py --strict
```

For deeper background, see `docs/guides/codegen_contributors.md`.
